name: python3-base58
title: python3-base58
summary: Python library with Base58 encode and decode functions
description:
Python library with Base58 encode and decode functions
This package contains the following functions, in a form compatible with that
used by the bitcoin network:
- b58encode
- b58decode
- b58encode_check
- b58decode_check
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-base58 because Python library with Base58 encode and decode functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-base58 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-base58 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-base58 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
